mapper.select: SELECT IFNULL(COUNT(o.order_no),0) AS todOrdCnt, IFNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN o.comp_yn = 'N' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END),0) AS pickCnt, IFNULL(SUM(o.ord_amt),0) AS todAmt FROM mu_tb_customer c INNER JOIN mu_tb_order o on c.cus_no = o.cus_no WHERE DATE(ord_date) = CURDATE()

WITH RECURSIVE months AS ( -- 현재 연도의 1월 1일부터 시작 SELECT DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y-01-01') AS month_dt UNION ALL -- 12월까지 1개월씩 증가 SELECT DATE_ADD(month_dt, INTERVAL 1 MONTH) FROM months WHERE month_dt < DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y-12-01') ) SELECT -- '2026-01' 대신 '01월', '02월' 형태로 출력 DATE_FORMAT(m.month_dt, '%m월') AS dt, COALESCE(SUM(o.ord_amt), 0) AS total_amt FROM months m LEFT JOIN mu_tb_order o ON o.ord_date >= m.month_dt AND o.ord_date < DATE_ADD(m.month_dt, INTERVAL 1 MONTH) GROUP BY m.month_dt ORDER BY m.month_dt ASC;

WITH MonthlySales AS ( SELECT IFNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN DATE_FORMAT(ord_date, '%Y-%m') = DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y-%m') THEN ord_amt ELSE 0 END), 0) AS curMonthAmt, IFNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN DATE_FORMAT(ord_date, '%Y-%m') = DATE_FORMAT(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 MONTH), '%Y-%m') THEN ord_amt ELSE 0 END), 0) AS preMonthAmt FROM mu_tb_order ) SELECT curMonthAmt AS monAmt, preMonthAmt AS lastAmt, CASE -- 전달 매출은 0인데 이번 달 매출이 있는 경우 100%로 표시 WHEN preMonthAmt = 0 AND curMonthAmt > 0 THEN 100.0 -- 둘 다 0이면 변동 없음(0%) WHEN preMonthAmt = 0 AND curMonthAmt = 0 THEN 0.0 -- 일반적인 경우 소수점 첫째 자리까지 계산 (감소 시 마이너스 자동 표시) ELSE ROUND(((curMonthAmt - preMonthAmt) / preMonthAmt) * 100, 1) END AS growthRate FROM MonthlySales;
